metadata.description: Azure Architecture Diagram Builder — User Feedback Trends workbook. Visualizes the App Insights custom event 'User_Feedback' (rating, category, hasComment, commentLength). Verbatim comment text is NOT in App Insights — it is stored durably in Cosmos DB (feedback container).
Full resource ID of the Application Insights component the workbook is scoped to.
Display name shown in the App Insights workbooks gallery.
Stable GUID so re-deploys update the same workbook instead of creating duplicates.

content.json:
## 📊 User Feedback Trends
Sentiment and engagement from the in-app **Share Feedback** modal (App Insights event `User_Feedback`).

> ℹ️ Verbatim comment **text** is stored in Cosmos DB (the `feedback` container), not here — this workbook shows the rating, category, whether a comment was left, and its length.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating), hasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), commentLength = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| summarize ['Total feedback'] = count(), ['Avg rating'] = round(avg(rating), 2), ['% with comment'] = round(100.0 * countif(hasComment == 'true') / count(), 1), ['Avg comment length'] = round(avg(commentLength), 0)
content.title: At a glance

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating)
| summarize ['Avg rating'] = avg(rating) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Average rating over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by Rating
| order by Rating asc
content.title: Rating distribution (1–5)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Category = tostring(customDimensions.category)
| summarize Count = count() by Category
| order by Count desc
content.title: Feedback by category

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend hasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), commentLength = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| summarize Total = count(), WithComment = countif(hasComment == 'true'), ['Avg comment length'] = round(avg(commentLength), 0) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend ['% with comment'] = round(100.0 * WithComment / Total, 1)
| project timestamp, ['% with comment'], ['Avg comment length']
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Comment engagement over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating), Category = tostring(customDimensions.category), HasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), ['Comment length'] = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| project timestamp, Rating, Category, HasComment, ['Comment length']
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent feedback (latest 100)

content.json:
## 🌍 Geography & audience
App Insights geolocates the **browser's egress IP**, not the device. On Microsoft-managed networks (Global Secure Access / corporate egress) that exit is **Microsoft/Azure**, so those users collapse to a US datacenter (e.g. `Boydton`) and their real country is hidden. These tiles therefore **count distinct users by `user_Id`** (an anonymous per-browser id — IP undercounts and misattributes) and **classify Microsoft/Azure egress separately** from genuine **External** users. The Microsoft classification is heuristic (Azure IP ranges + datacenter city).

content.query:
union pageViews, customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Origin = iff(isMsEgress, 'Microsoft network (geo unreliable)', 'External')
| order by Users desc
content.title: Audience split — distinct users by network origin

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton')
| where not(isMsEgress)
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id), Feedback = count(), ['Avg rating'] = round(avg(toint(customMeasurements.rating)), 2) by Country = client_CountryOrRegion, ['City/Region'] = strcat(client_City, ', ', client_StateOrProvince)
| order by Users desc
content.title: External feedback by location (by user)

content.query:
union pageViews, customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| where not(isMsEgress) and isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id), Sessions = dcount(session_Id), Events = count() by Country = client_CountryOrRegion
| order by Users desc
| take 50
content.title: Overall reach — external users by country (by user_Id)

content.query:
union pageViews, customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| where not(isMsEgress) and isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by client_CountryOrRegion
| order by Users desc
content.title: Overall reach — world map (external users)

content.json:
## 🛟 Recovered comments (telemetry fallback)
When the durable Cosmos write fails — most often when a nightly policy disables Cosmos public access — the app captures the **full comment text** in App Insights as `Feedback_Persist_Failed`. These comments are **not** in Cosmos, so this table is the only place to read them. `reason` shows why the write failed (`http_500`, `http_503`, `network_error`).

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Feedback_Persist_Failed'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| project timestamp, Rating = toint(customDimensions.rating), Category = tostring(customDimensions.category), Comment = tostring(customDimensions.comment), Reason = tostring(customDimensions.reason), Diagram = tostring(customDimensions.diagramName), Model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| order by timestamp desc
| take 200
content.title: Recovered comments — full text (not persisted to Cosmos)
content.noDataMessage: No persistence failures in this range — all comments were saved to Cosmos. 🎉
